top_findings.title: No SQLite/embedded DB persistence — data held in an in-memory global
top_findings.evidence: src/main.rs:23 static mut BOOKS; sqlx/uuid unused; README admits in-memory
top_findings.suggestion: Wire an actual sqlx SqlitePool into the handlers

top_findings.title: Shared mutable state via unsafe static mut is a data race under concurrent requests
top_findings.evidence: src/main.rs:23 static mut BOOKS accessed in unsafe blocks (62,81,103,125,140); warp runs handlers concurrently -> UB

top_findings.title: The only substantive tests are in a dead file never compiled or run
top_findings.evidence: src/main_test.rs (331 LOC) not declared as a module in main.rs; cargo never compiles it
top_findings.suggestion: Move into tests/ and exercise the real routes

top_findings.title: All tests that actually run are placeholders — the application is effectively untested
top_findings.evidence: tests/api_tests.rs:9 and tests/integration_tests.rs:10 assert_eq!(true,true); none invoke main.rs handlers
top_findings.suggestion: Write integration tests that call the real warp routes
